chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1213 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 5074/2023 3.For hearing of main case 12-09-2023 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Dhareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Additional Attorney General. ***** Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, has filed power on behalf of respondents-SEPCO, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition and submits that petitioner may be put at liberty to file a proper complaint before the Electric Inspector, Sukkur or avail any other remedy for redressal of his grievance(s). Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
